productDisplayName: Numero Uno Men Yellow Flip Flops
description: Effortlessly comfortable and stylish, these bright coloured flip flops from numero uno are all you need for a cool, casual look. Perfect for pool side or beach wear, or for popping on your feet when you want the easiest footwear option! Upper Thong straps that are smooth for absolute comfort Textured upper with brand badge Toe separator to hold the foot in place Textured rubber footbed with printed brand name Oustole Foam outsole for a comfortable ride with grooves for grip Flip flop care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
